verdict_reasoning: BAX is a cytosolic and mitochondrial-outer-membrane pro-apoptotic BCL-2 family protein. No documented PM pool under baseline or stress conditions. No TM domain, GPI anchor, or stable surface-anchoring mechanism. No cancer ecto-presentation, cell-death PM externalization, developmental surface restriction, or activation-induced surface translocation. Apoptotic activation occurs at the mitochondrion, not the PM. Only surface biology would be pMHC presentation of intracellular peptides, which does not establish protein-body accessibility.
